items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-V2-CLAIM-SURFACE-REWORK-001B and does not substitute a runtime, package, or release work package.
All changed files remain within README.md and the authorized .shirube governance/audit artifacts.
README no longer presents Claude/Codex startup adapter, hook, runner, or bridge paths as public L2 startup-recovery readiness.
required_evidence: README Claude Code resession recovery section

items.criterion: README clearly labels configured adapter paths as experimental, internal, or operator-controlled until L2 recovery evidence is accepted.
required_evidence: README Current Core MVP Capability Boundary

items.criterion: README no longer implies shared PostgreSQL cross-agent memory linkage, federation, common DB, or backend parity as a Core MVP claim.
README preserves the L1 Core MVP boundary: current wasurezu-compatible MCP memory/recovery, SQLite default, same agent/project boundary, and no future-guardrail claims.
required_evidence: README Current Core MVP Capability Boundary

items.criterion: The PR does not authorize release, npm publish, public alpha, enterprise readiness, UAMP conformance, backend parity, federation, compliance, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
Diff, YAML, and JSON validation evidence is present and accurately reported.
